$comment: MCP servers for this project. Used by adapters to generate Claude Code (.mcp.json), OpenCode (opencode.json), and Codex (config.toml) configs. Path to TV server is relative to repo root for portability. platform_overrides lets a single server entry adapt per OS — e.g. tradingview is bridged WSL→Windows when host is WSL because TV Desktop is Windows-only.

wsl.$comment: On WSL Ubuntu, TV Desktop runs on Windows native. wsl_tv_bridge.sh exec's node.exe against the Windows-side clone via /mnt/c/. Requires TV_MCP_WIN_REPO env in $REPO/.env (e.g. C:\Users\jose\wally-trader).
